label: Strategy Heatmap
description: Strategy risk status grid with circuit breaker trip/reset actions, utilisation scale, and kill switch controls.

0.6.note: Skeleton loading guard already present (5 skeleton rows).

0.7.note: Empty state: inline 'No strategy heatmap data' message when strategyRiskHeatmap.length===0.

0.8.note: hasError guard returning 'Failed to load strategy heatmap'.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[risk]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports. 0.6 Skeleton loading guard already present (5 skeleton rows). 0.7 Empty state: inline 'No strategy heatmap data' message when strategyRiskHeatmap.length===0. 0.8 Added hasError guard returning 'Failed to load strategy heatmap'. 0.9 No dead code.

1.2.note: use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3-1.5 strategyRiskHeatmap comes from riskLimitsData?.heatmap in context; scope-filtered limits drive the source data.

1.3.note: 1.5 strategyRiskHeatmap comes from riskLimitsData?.heatmap in context; scope-filtered limits drive the source data.

1.5.note: strategyRiskHeatmap comes from riskLimitsData?.heatmap in context; scope-filtered limits drive the source data.

1.7.note: No mock constants in widget. FINDING: strategyRiskHeatmap field in use-risk-page-data.ts falls back to empty array [] when riskLimitsData?.heatmap is absent — this means the heatmap won't show mocked strategies unless the API returns heatmap data. MOCK_STRATEGIES defined in lib/mocks is not used to populate the heatmap fallback in context.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useRiskData() hook. 1.2 use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3-1.5 strategyRiskHeatmap comes from riskLimitsData?.heatmap in context; scope-filtered limits drive the source data. 1.6 Empty scope returns unfiltered data. 1.7 No mock constants in widget. FINDING: strategyRiskHeatmap field in use-risk-page-data.ts falls back to empty array [] when riskLimitsData?.heatmap is absent — this means the heatmap won't show mocked strategies unless the API returns heatmap data. MOCK_STRATEGIES defined in lib/mocks is not used to populate the heatmap fallback in context.

knownIssues: strategyRiskHeatmap falls back to [] when API heatmap field absent — MOCK_STRATEGIES in lib/mocks is not wired as fallback; heatmap may appear empty in dev/mock mode
findings: Added hasError early-return guard (widget had isLoading handling but no error state)
